svg.title: Synalux POS — 00c comUined roles
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for 00c comUined roles. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Combined Role Tests — Multi-Role Staff Workflows
Tip pool splits between both roles by hours worked
Tables-only access as Host (no Register, no Payment)
Cannot approve voids/discounts in either role
Hours tracked per role for tip pool
Manager can open register + run EOD
Server mode: same Register, no void/discount auth
Switch back to Manager: void auth restored
All actions logged per active role at time of action
Audit log tracks role at each action
COMBINED ROLE RULES (admin: Settings > Staff > Multi-Role Policy)
1. Multi-role staff see role picker after PIN — single-role staff auto-route
2. Role switch available anytime from user menu (top-right avatar) — no re-PIN required within shift
3. Permissions are UNION of active role only — switching role changes available screens instantly
4. Audit trail records (staff_id, active_role, action, timestamp) — tip pool uses hours-per-role breakdown
5. Open orders transfer between role switches — no data loss
6. Manager/Admin override: hold staff tile 3s to bypass for emergencies
7. Max roles per staff: configurable (default 3) — prevents role sprawl
8. Role assignment requires Admin or Manager PIN to modify
